$description: Motion motifs tied to the eye metaphor. brand-system spec requires ≥4 motifs: gaze-track, iris-dilate, portal-transition, cursor-orbit.

gaze-track.$description: Element follows pointer like a gaze. Smooth lag.

iris-dilate.$description: State change — scale and brightness pulse like iris dilating.

portal-transition.$description: Between-universe — collapse to iris, expand into next world.

cursor-orbit.$description: Companion element orbits cursor at fixed radius.
